_comment: Single source of truth for the DevPT app catalog. The footer list is rendered from this file by app.js. Apps with placement 'plate' must have a visible id="app-<id>" surface in index.html that links to the app URL. placement values: 'hero' | 'nav' | 'plate' | 'footer'.

apps.name: PainMap
apps.blurb: Development and validation work for 3D symptom mapping beyond the 0-10 scale.

apps.name: simEMR
apps.blurb: Documentation that behaves like a real chart.

apps.name: simCHAT
apps.blurb: A virtual patient to interview, on demand.

apps.name: simAQUA
apps.blurb: How the body responds to water.
apps.note: Repo deploy workflow is currently gated on a missing Azure secret (inert) as of 2026-06; verify the subdomain is actually serving.

apps.name: simLAB
apps.blurb: Pre-built scenario packs run end to end as one continuous case.

unlisted.name: PT Rapid Recall
unlisted.note: Onboarding into DevPT/Education (2026-07-01). Data-safety hazard RESOLVED: the deploy workflow now uses `prisma migrate deploy` (committed migration 20260126_init_postgresql; no --accept-data-loss; DB mutates only on push to the default branch, never on PRs). Remaining before public promotion: a stable devpt.app subdomain (currently only a raw Azure SWA host).

engines.role: Branching clinical-scenario engine; consumed by devpt as a git submodule.
Shared 3D rig/pose library; consumed by 3DPainMap, anatomy-viewer, aquatic-therapy. Currently also the de-facto source of the runtime mannequin GLBs.
Intended canonical mannequin GLB assets — currently UNCONSUMED (apps copy GLBs from pose-engine/models instead). Resolve the source of truth.
